overall.description: A first-person walk through a stormy night in GTA V, approaching and moving through a deserted Mobil gas station. Heavy rain creates reflections on the wet asphalt while palm trees sway in the wind, and the gas station's artificial lighting cuts through the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked suburban street approaching gas station

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet road toward the illuminated Mobil gas station

entered.detail: large illuminated canopy with Mobil logo visible in the distance
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
tall street lamps illuminating the road
single-story convenience store structure with white walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rain-slicked suburban street at night. Palm trees line the left side while the illuminated Mobil gas station canopy grows larger ahead on the right. The camera moves steadily forward through the downpour, with street lights casting pools of light on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station forecourt under the main canopy

events.description: moves from the open street into the gas station canopy area

agents.ego_description: walking under the gas station canopy toward the fuel pumps

entered.detail: row of fuel dispensers under the canopy with illuminated displays
black garbage bin near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the gas station canopy, transitioning from the open rain to a sheltered space. The fuel pumps come into view in the center while the convenience store structure becomes more defined on the right. The artificial lighting becomes brighter and more direct overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station service area alongside the convenience store

events.description: camera turns slightly right to follow the building edge, revealing the side entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the gas station building past the air and water station

entered.detail: glass door entrance to the gas station shop with green frame
tire inflation and water dispenser unit against the wall
glass enclosed telephone booth near the building corner

segments.scene_description: Moving alongside the gas station building, the camera passes the air and water station while the fuel pumps recede into the background. The convenience store entrance becomes visible on the right as the camera follows the building's edge, with the canopy now overhead to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, rain-drenched suburban street into the artificial brightness of a deserted gas station. It begins by moving steadily forward through a heavy downpour, passing swaying palm trees as the illuminated Mobil canopy grows larger on the right. As the camera glides under the canopy, the open rain gives way to a sheltered space where the overhead lighting becomes direct and the fuel pumps emerge in the center. The scene then shifts as the camera follows the edge of the convenience store building, passing the air and water station while the pumps recede into the background. Finally, the movement continues along the building's perimeter until the store entrance comes into view on the right.
